title: 3010 Theory
wikitext:
[]: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Sat Jan 04, 2020 9:17 am So, I have this little theory that I wanted to share here. I kind of had this idea. Please try to correct me or point me to someone that already figured it out. What if unit 13 is a reconstruction from what is left out of unit 03. 03-13... Now that said. What if Asuka finally finishes her job and teaches unit 2 completely in the battle seen in the trailer to stop the impact. Given that she survives... She might be forced to pilot 13 with Shinji in dual sync. It would be a bit messed up for her to return to the unit that raped her mind and body. That is why I find it plausible that Anno will do it. After that. MY guess is that the two of them will cause the final impact or turn back time somehow. Hence the +1.0. Or they might both end up dead and we get something similar to the end of the manga. I would like to hear your opinions. What do you think? Am I onto something?

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 04, 2020 9:59 am Eva-03 was a production model; Eva-13 is an Adams that survived from Second Impact. Had Eva-03 been an Adams, the whole 9th Angel incident would have had a very good chance of awakening the Eva and causing an Impact.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Sat Jan 04, 2020 10:32 am Reichu wrote: Eva-03 was a production model; Eva-13 is an Adams that survived from Second Impact. Had Eva-03 been an Adams, the whole 9th Angel incident would have had a very good chance of awakening the Eva and causing an Impact.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 04, 2020 1:20 pm Mari says it outright. If for whatever reason you don't believe her, the fact that Eva-13 turns into a Radiant Giant when it acquires the Fruit of Life and has the ability to open the Gates of Guf (something regular Evas can't do -- case in point, see Eva-04's pseudo-Impact) tell you all you need to know.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Sun Jan 05, 2020 2:42 am Reichu wrote: Mari says it outright. If for whatever reason you don't believe her, the fact that Eva-13 turns into a Radiant Giant when it acquires the Fruit of Life and has the ability to open the Gates of Guf (something regular Evas can't do -- case in point, see Eva-04's pseudo-Impact) tell you all you need to know.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Jan 05, 2020 7:43 pm Caroline L.S. wrote: What kind of narrative purpose would that plot serve?

Article: 3010 Theory
[]: 3.0+1.0 Theory             Quote Post by Caroline L.S. » Sat Jan 04, 2020 9:17 am So, I have this little theory that I wanted to share here. I kind of had this idea. Please try to correct me or point me to someone that already figured it out. What if unit 13 is a reconstruction from what is left out of unit 03. 03-13... Now that said. What if Asuka finally finishes her job and teaches unit 2 completely in the battle seen in the trailer to stop the impact. Given that she survives... She might be forced to pilot 13 with Shinji in dual sync. It would be a bit messed up for her to return to the unit that raped her mind and body. That is why I find it plausible that Anno will do it. After that. MY guess is that the two of them will cause the final impact or turn back time somehow. Hence the +1.0. Or they might both end up dead and we get something similar to the end of the manga. I would like to hear your opinions. What do you think? Am I onto something?

Had Eva-03 been an Adams, the whole 9th Angel incident would have had a very good chance of awakening the Eva and causing an Impact.
